transcript: The store is about almost a year and a half old now, and so it was actually a blank slate. There was, I think, a lounge or something that was here before. So when I was able to take it over, we built it from the ground up. 18 months or so later, we're starting to really get our traction, starting to get a lot of new customers, a lot of people realizing that we're here in the area. And I like to say we have the best technology, the best machines that the business has to offer. We do have the best clients, of course.
summary: A store owner discusses their business, which is about a year and a half old, and how they built it from the ground up, now gaining traction with new customers and offering the best technology and machines. The owner expresses pride in their clients and the progress made. The store's growth is attributed to its unique offerings and customer base.
